# נתי שירותי חשמל — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A fully licensed and certified electrician business focused on delivering safe, reliable electrical services with strict adherence to safety standards and fast response times. The brand emphasizes precision, expertise, and customer satisfaction across residential and commercial projects, positioning itself as a trustworthy partner for all electrical needs.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About נתי שירותי חשמל
A fully licensed and certified electrician business focused on delivering safe, reliable electrical services with strict adherence to safety standards and fast response times. The brand emphasizes precision, expertise, and customer satisfaction across residential and commercial projects, positioning itself as a trustworthy partner for all electrical needs.

## Target Audience
- New Homeowners
- Property Managers
- Renovation Contractors
- Small Business Owners
- Smart Home Enthusiasts

## Industry
Electrical Services
